name: export_gamma
description: Starts exporting an existing Gamma presentation or document to a downloadable file. Use this when the user wants a PDF, PowerPoint (pptx), or PNG image export of a Gamma they already have. Requires the Gamma file ID or URL and the format: "pdf", "pptx", or "png" (png returns a ZIP archive with one PNG per card). This returns immediately and renders an interactive widget that shows export progress and the download link when ready — you do not need to check status or call get_export_status yourself. Do NOT call export_gamma again to check progress (that starts a brand-new export). The download link expires after about one week and is not tied to the API key, so share it carefully and download promptly.

gammaIdOrUrl.description: The Gamma file ID or a full Gamma URL to export. Examples: "g5aykcic8ujm71s" or "https://gamma.app/docs/My-Deck-g5aykcic8ujm71s".

exportAs.description: Output format: "pdf" → a .pdf, "pptx" → a .pptx, "png" → a .zip archive containing one PNG per card (not a single image).
